amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 72 — paragraph 3
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 72 — paragraph 3

## Text proposed by the Commission

3. The non-compliance of the AI system with any requirements or obligations under this Regulation, other than those laid down in Articles 5 and 10, shall be subject to administrative fines of up to 250 000 EUR.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

3. the non-compliance of the AI system with any requirements or obligations under this Regulation, other than those laid down in Articles 5 and 10, shall be subject to administrative fines of up to EUR 750 000 .
commission_text: 3. The non-compliance of the AI system with any requirements or obligations under this Regulation, other than those laid down in Articles 5 and 10, shall be subject to administrative fines of up to 250 000 EUR.
parliament_text: 3. the non-compliance of the AI system with any requirements or obligations under this Regulation, other than those laid down in Articles 5 and 10, shall be subject to administrative fines of up to EUR 750 000 .
